The original dataset contained a provider entry for Go Power but no tariff information. The official Go Power website was reviewed and it was found that the company supplies electricity primarily to industrial and commercial customers. Residential electricity tariff prices are not publicly listed and customers must request a quote through a callback or contact form. Therefore no tariff rates or standing charges could be validated and these values were recorded as "Not Mentioned".
